posts.author: PierreM (PB)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have a user requesting to be alerted when the date of any item is within 2 months. I’ve managed to make a filter for this by using an additionnal formula column and the DAYS() function(The filter show the columns where the formula result is less than 60).

However I don’t find any way to create an automation so the user gets notified when a new item is within 2 months. I wanted to use the “When a number is less than a value, notify someone” but my formula column is not available there. And I don’t find a way to do it directly with the date column.
